rationale: Section 25.07 governs taxation of leasehold interests in exempt property and cross-references only §11.11(b) and (c). It does not reference or depend on the §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so raising that amount creates no conflict.
quote: Except as provided by Sections 11.11(b) and (c), a leasehold or other possessory interest in exempt property may not be listed if:
_note: No conflict found. §25.07's only cross-reference to exemption provisions is §11.11(b) and (c), not §11.13(b).
